---
#title: ""
image: images/FamilyPic.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  # links:
  #   - icon: linkedin
  #     text: LinkedIn
  #     href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samanthacsik/
  #     target: _blank
  #   # - icon: twitter
  #   #   text: Twitter
  #   #   href: https://twitter.com/SamanthaCsik
  #   #   target: _blank
  #   - icon: github
  #     text: GitHub
  #     href: https://github.com/samanthacsik
  #     target: _blank
  #   - icon: envelope
  #     text: Email
  #     href: mailto:scsik@ucsb.edu
---

::: {#bio}
Hi there! I'm Lee McCoy. I am running for the **Select Board of Hamilton, MA** because I have a strong desire to bring people together and build community. I am the type of person who likes get things done through a combination of problem solving and dogged determination. I would be proud to serve Hamilton and to help ensure it remains a place where all people can live, thrive, and belong. Poke around to learn more [about me](about.qmd) and what I want to accomplish for Hamilton!


::: {#landing-icons}
[{{< fa brands linkedin title="linkedin" >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/leemccoy/){target="_blank"} &nbsp; [{{< fa brands github title="github" >}}](https://github.com/leemccoy){target="_blank"} &nbsp; 
:::
:::
